sentences.arabic: فِي الأَفْرَاحِ، تَضَعُ النِّسَاءُ الحِنَّاءَ عَلَى أَيْدِيهِنَّ.
sentences.translation: Na proslavama, žene stavljaju kandžu na ruke.
sentences.translationEn: At celebrations, women put henna on their hands.
Henna gives a beautiful red color.

sentences.translation: Žene sjede zajedno i ukrašavaju jedna drugu.
sentences.translationEn: Women sit together and decorate each other.

sentences.translation: Ovo je stara i omiljena tradicija.
sentences.translationEn: This is an old and beloved tradition.
